name: all-three-fresh badge requires not only standards and compliance but also pr-corpus to be fresh
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"standards":"fresh","compliance":"fresh","pr_corpus":"stale"}\n' > status.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/three-fresh-badge.sh" --status status.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'badge=not-all-fresh' out.txt && grep -q 'pr_corpus=stale' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
